title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Derby, and Gold City
is fired up more than ever to rewrite her
reputation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I warn her that reputations can't be overturned
with just one race, but she doesn't take my advice
to heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City heads into the race to earn the title of
Derby champion.
